title: Acclaim Albany Holiday Park
description: Cosy holiday units in a park with a playground, a BBQ area and basketball and volleyball courts.
hotelDescription:
Set in park-like surroundings off Albany Highway, these relaxed holiday units are 7 km from the Amity Museum, 12 km from Oyster Harbour and 16 km from Torndirrup National Park.
 Featuring equipped kitchens, the cosy, informal cabins also have bunk beds, TVs with DVD players and shared bathrooms. Upgraded cabins offer en suite showers.
 There's a park area with a playground and BBQ facilities. Basketball and volleyball courts are available. There's also a caravan site.

title: Albany Happy Days Caravan Park
description: Straightforward cabins with kitchenettes next to a river, plus RV sites, campsites & canoe rentals.
address: Happy Days Cvan Pk, 1584 Millbrook Rd, King River WA 6330, Australia
street: Happy Days Cvan Pk, 1584 Millbrook Rd

title: Tasman Holiday Parks - Albany
description: Relaxed resort offering warmly furnished cabins, an outdoor pool & a tennis court, plus a BBQ area.
address: 22 Wellington St, Centennial Park WA 6330, Australia
hotelDescription:
Adjacent to sports fields, this laid-back resort set a kilometre off Highway 1 is 6 km from both Ellen Cove and the Brig Amity, a replica of a 19th-century merchant vessel.
 The warmly furnished cabins provide kitchenettes, flat-screen TVs and complimentary Wi-Fi. Family cabins offer 2 bedrooms and bunk beds.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a tennis court and a BBQ area, in addition to a game room and a kids' playground. A campground is on-site.

title: BIG4 Emu Beach Holiday Park
address: 8 Medcalf Parade, Emu Point WA 6330, Australia

title: BIG4 Middleton Beach Holiday Park
description: Casual beachfront resort featuring a playground, a BBQ area & outdoor pools, plus a game room.
address: 28 Flinders Parade, Middleton Beach WA 6330, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set 3 km from Albany's city centre, this relaxed resort surrounded by trees on a beach along Ellen Cove is also 5 km from live performances at the Albany Entertainment Centre.
 Casual cabins and chalets have free Wi-Fi, kitchens, living/dining rooms and TVs, as well as DVD players and patios. Upgraded quarters add flat-screen TVs and whirlpool baths. Villas and beach houses offer decks/courtyards, BBQs and/or washer/dryers.
 Amenities include direct beach access, an outdoor pool, a kids' pool and a hot tub. There’s also a BBQ area, a playground, a game room and a guest lounge, plus coin-operated laundry facilities and a campsite.

title: King River Palms Caravan Park
address: 795 Chester Pass Rd, Willyung WA 6330, Australia

title: Panorama Caravan Park
address: 71 Panorama Rd, Big Grove WA 6330, Australia

title: Rose Gardens Holiday Park
address: 45 Mermaid Ave, Emu Point WA 6330, Australia

title: Great Wolf Lodge | Northern California
description: Buzzy resort featuring bars & restaurants, plus mini-golf, an indoor water park & an outdoor pool.
hotelDescription:
Set alongside retail parks, this lively resort is 3 miles from Oakwood Lake, and 4 miles from both Dell'Osso Family Farm, which has a corn maze, and Interstate 5.
 Casual suites have Internet access, flat-screens, and sitting areas with pull-out sofas, plus minifridges. Some feature cabin-themed sleeping areas for kids.
 There's complimentary access to an indoor water park. Other amenities include an outdoor pool, and 9 bars and restaurants, as well as a gym, a kids' club and an arcade. There's mini-golf, a high-ropes course and a bowling alley. Breakfast and parking are available.
